base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of run_aim_diagonal_down — a character from 1987 contra. Running while firing downward-diagonal — jump-spray maneuver. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
